title: HOMCOM Inflatable Christmas Santa Claus Air Blown Decoration Yard
features: FESTIVE HOLIDAY FUN: This 8ft tall inflatable Christmas Santa with a candy cane is a fun, creative way to decorate your yard during the holiday season.
WARM INTERNAL GLOW: This large Christmas inflatable is internally illuminated with 8 white LED lights that add a soft glow to your yard display, perfect for dark winter nights.
INSTANT SET-UP: The whole display self-inflates in minutes when plugged into any standard electrical outlet and deflates quickly into a compact unit for storage until next holiday season.

DURABLE MATERIALS: Made from a waterproof, weather-resistant polyester cloth material with a IP44 waterproof rating and a UL certification, this tree will be a lasting, festive decoration for years to come.
HARDWARE AND ACCESSORIES: This complete display kit includes an internal fan, tether ropes, sandbags, and ground stakes to help secure your holiday yard display.
description: Product Description This Inflatable Santa Claus is a perfect accessory to have as part of your decorations. Standing as 240cm tall, it has great height to catch anyone's attention. This is a great compliment to your festivies and the holiday season. Features: Inflatable Santa holding a candy cane Polyester cloth makes it durable and sturdy Can shine at night with 2 sets of LED light Being inflatable for easy storage and display The material is water proof in case bad weather Specification： Condition: Brand New Material: 190D polyester cloth Colour: As shown in the picture Net weight: 1.35kg Overall dimensions: 160L × 90W × 240H (cm) String length: 1.6m Transformer standard: 12V/1250mA Fan Current: 1.2 A Water proof rate: IP20 Power line length: 3m Accessories included: 2 sets of LED lights, 5 spikes, 3 strings Gross weight: 1.9kg Packing dimensions: 24L × 20W × 18H (cm) Custom Label: 844-008 NOTE: Please don't place it outdoor in hard rain or snow! 844-370V70 844-169V70 844-161 844-232V70 844-242V70 844-166V70 Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 173 4.4 out of 5 stars 765 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,425 4.4 out of 5 stars 34 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,425 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,425 Item Name Inflatable Santa Claus on Sleigh Inflatable Snowman Inflatable santa claus Inflatable Snowman Inflatable Santa Claus Inflatable Santa Claus LED Light 5 3 3 5 4 1 Product Dimension 200cm x 80cm x 128cm 100cm x 55cm x 120cm 150cm x 80 cm x 248cm 140W x 70D x 180H cm 180cm x 90cm x 165cm 70L x 50W x 120Hcm Cable Length 2m 3m 3m 3m 1.9m 3m Material Polyester cloth Polyester Fabric Polyester Fabric Polyester Fabric Polyester cloth Polyester Fabric
